name: Acorn
description: Acorns capped and round, each nut re-tinting on reseed.

code.style: --rule: ( @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 30%; top: 36%; width: 40%; height: 50%; border-radius: 30% 30% 50% 50%; background: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; } :after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 26%; top: 22%; width: 48%; height: 24%; border-radius: 50% 50% 30% 30%; background: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; } } -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
